/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -march=native -fno-omit-frame-pointer -shared -Wl,-soname,libenv.so -o libenv.so CMakeFiles/env.dir/src/assetgen.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/env.dir/src/basic-abstract-game.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/env.dir/src/cpp-utils.cpp.o" CMakeFiles/env.dir/src/entity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/env.dir/src/game.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/env.dir/src/game-registry.cpp.o" CMakeFiles/env.dir/src/games/dodgeball.cpp.o CMakeFiles/env.dir/src/games/bigfish.cpp.o CMakeFiles/env.dir/src/games/bossfight.cpp.o CMakeFiles/env.dir/src/games/caveflyer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/env.dir/src/games/climber.cpp.o CMakeFiles/env.dir/src/games/coinrun_old.cpp.o CMakeFiles/env.dir/src/games/coinrun.cpp.o CMakeFiles/env.dir/src/games/coinrun_aisc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/env.dir/src/games/coinrun_mod_wall.cpp.o CMakeFiles/env.dir/src/games/fruitbot.cpp.o CMakeFiles/env.dir/src/games/heist.cpp.o CMakeFiles/env.dir/src/games/heist_aisc_many_chests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/env.dir/src/games/heist_aisc_many_keys.cpp.o CMakeFiles/env.dir/src/games/jumper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/env.dir/src/games/leaper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/env.dir/src/games/maze.cpp.o CMakeFiles/env.dir/src/games/maze_fixed_size.cpp.o CMakeFiles/env.dir/src/games/maze_aisc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/env.dir/src/games/maze_yellowline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/env.dir/src/games/maze_redline_yellowgem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/env.dir/src/games/maze_yellowstar_redgem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/env.dir/src/games/miner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/env.dir/src/games/ninja.cpp.o CMakeFiles/env.dir/src/games/chaser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/env.dir/src/games/plunder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/env.dir/src/games/starpilot.cpp.o CMakeFiles/env.dir/src/mazegen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/env.dir/src/randgen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/env.dir/src/roomgen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/env.dir/src/resources.cpp.o CMakeFiles/env.dir/src/vecgame.cpp.o CMakeFiles/env.dir/src/vecoptions.cpp.o  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Core.so.5.15.13
